calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Four Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones.

Petitioner Ren Mei Liang was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors, Zibiao Zheng, a/k/a Zi Biao Zheng, Ziquan Zheng, a/k/a Zi Quan Zheng, Zilaing Zheng, a/k/a Zi Liang Zheng and Zibo Zheng, a/k/a Zi Bo Zheng
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Charles J. Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: James Zibiaz Zheng, Johnny Ziquan Zheng, Aidan Ziliang Zheng and Jacky Zibo Zheng.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
